questionText: Which of the following are good file naming conventions? For each statement, select Yes if it is a good practice or No if it is not.

statements.text: Do NOT use special characters ( ! @ # $ % ^& * () ' ' : ; ?, [] { } and | ).
Insert spaces between words
Use long, descriptive file names
For file name series that include dates, use the format MMDDYY

questionText: You are having problems with your Windows laptop computer. Before contacting support, you must gather information about your device, its processor, RAM amount, and the version of OS. On a Windows computer, where can you find the device and system information?
You post a funny and embarrassing photo of your friend on social media. How long will the information stay on the internet?

options.text: Forever, even after you delete it

statements.text: Passport number
Eye color

questionText: What is a benefit of 'in private' or 'incognito' browsing?

options.text: Digital fingerprinting can't be used to track your browser activities
Your web browser remembers the files you download

questionText: What is the main contributor to your digital identity?

options.text: Data stored on your computer that allows you to log in to a secure website through a secure account
For each site or service you use, your username and password

questionText: You need to collaborate with your peers and share your class journal. Which digital platform is appropriate for this classroom activity?

options.text: Position the screen slightly above eye level
Shine the primary light source directly onto the screen
Make sure the primary light source is not shining directly into your eyes
Make sure the screen is not too close to your eyes

options.text: Use a mix of letters, numbers, and symbols
Use something easy to remember, like '12345' or 'p@ssword'

options.text: The number of likes and shares the article has received

pairs.left: You and your friend conduct a video chat to brainstorm ideas for the story.
On your own, you write the story, while your friend draws the artwork. While you work, you send emails with questions and updates.

Enables machines to process and comprehend text or speech, helping communication between humans and computers in a more instinctive way.

statements.text: The message uses a generic greeting

options.text: Sharing your password with trusted friends

questionText: For each statement about time differences between wired and wireless networking, select True or False.

statements.text: Wireless networks typically have slower data transmission speeds than Ethernet connections

An Ethernet connection typically provides faster network connection speeds than a Wi-Fi connection

options.text: It showcases your wit and digital artistry skills.

statements.text: Include the poem as part of a portfolio of your original work

options.text: Take frequent short breaks during which you walk around

statements.text: An Ethernet connection typically provides faster network connection speeds than a Wi-Fi connection

questionText: Juliana takes photos with her phone for the school yearbook. She takes more than 50 photographs each day. Juliana needs to use the quickest and most reliable method to back up the photos so she can delete them from her phone each day. What should Juliana do?

options.text: Sync her phone to cloud storage.
Delete only the photos she doesn't want to use.

statements.text: Work must be registered with the copyright office to be protected by copyright

options.text: Confidential data is safer from theft and intrusion

options.text: Creative Commons content can only be used if you pay a fee to the original creator for each use.

options.text: Restore the document by removing their changes.

statements.text: You use an idea from a news article

questionText: You need to follow ethical standards of behavior to protect your digital reputation. Which action meets the requirements? (Choose 2.)

options.text: Comply with the terms of the Acceptable Use Policy while using your school's Wi-Fi.

questionText: For each physical health risk, select Yes if it is associated with prolonged computer use or No if it is not.

questionText: You have written an original recipe that you want to share on social media. options.text: Some social media sites do not allow you to format information as a bulleted list

statements.text: You can change document margins from the Print settings

options.text: The web version of a desktop application has all the same features as the desktop version

questionText: Which of the following is an example of cyberbullying?

options.text: Helping a friend by posting researched articles about bullying to their blog
Posting songs of your favorite artists online and charging your friends money to download them.
Writing an opinion article about the unfair requirements of cheerleader tryouts and submitting it to your school news website.

questionText: You use a public computer at the library to check email and your bank account balance. You need to prevent other people who use the computer after you from accessing your email and bank accounts. Which two tasks should you complete before leaving the computer? (Choose 2.)

options.text: Clear the browser's cache and cookies
Log out of the email and bank websites

questionText: Move each AI term from the list on the left to its definition on the right.

pairs.left: Possesses many small parts, like tiny computers, that can figure out patterns and connections just like humans do when they learn new things.
Enables machines to gain knowledge from data and improve their performance over time without being explicitly programmed.
Focuses on creating physical machines capable of performing tasks autonomously or with minimal human intervention.
Enables machines to process and comprehend text or speech, helping communication between humans and computers in a more instinctive way.

questionText: For each statement about images that are protected by Creative Commons licenses and not in the public domain, select True or False.

pairs.left: Can be accessed on any device with an internet connection

options.text: Post a revenge photo with his face on bacon.
Assume it's about your weight and go on a diet

questionText: Which backup method offers the best protection for your data?

options.text: Deleting files you don't need anymore
Keeping files only on your computer's hard drive

questionText: You need to maintain the security of your smartphone. Which three guidelines should you follow? (Choose 3.)

options.text: Disable Wi-Fi and Bluetooth when you're not using them.
Update your smartphone's operating system only if you need a new feature offered in the update.
Use a USB 3.0 or newer connection cable when connecting to a new computer.
Do not leave your device unattended in public or easily accessible areas.

options.text: Mute their microphone until you call on them

options.text: Reviewing the article's publication date and checking for recent updates

statements.text: Share large files from a cloud storage location instead of attaching them to email messages

A program that can copy itself and spread to other computers

questionText: What distinguishes generative AI from chatbots?

options.text: Generative AI and chatbots are terms used interchangeably to refer to the same technology

Both generative AI and chatbots excel at simulating conversations, but generative AI is restricted to pre-defined responses.

questionText: Move each data storage device from the list on the left to the correct definition on the right.

questionText: What mental health issue can excessive social media use potentially lead to?

options.text: Use words that can be found in the dictionary of a language other than your primary language.
